text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on NATO: NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈北约：北约没有为我们提供支持，未来也不会！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Pope Leo: Will someone please tell Pope Leo that Iran has killed at least 42,000 innocent, completely unarmed, protesters in the last two months, and that for Iran to have a Nuclear Bomb is absolutely unacceptable. Thank you for your attention to this matter. AMERICA IS BACK!!! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈教皇利奥：有没有人能告诉教皇利奥，伊朗在过去两个月里杀害了至少42,000名无辜且完全手无寸铁的抗议者，而且伊朗拥有核弹是绝对不可接受的。感谢您对此事的关注。美国回来了！！！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Another Brutal Israeli Occupation Strike: Civilians Targeted in Al-Shati Refugee Camp, Gaza At least five Palestinians were killed and several others wounded after an Israeli strike hit a civilian area in Al-Shati Refugee Camp, west of Gaza City.
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 又一次残酷的以色列占领军袭击：加沙Al-Shati难民营平民成为目标。在以色列袭击加沙城西部Al-Shati难民营的一个平民区后，至少五名巴勒斯坦人丧生，另有多人受伤。

text: 🐻 All the key news of the past 24 hours - just because we like you ➡️ Russian Rostec has tested the technology of group use of strike drones. ➡️ Slovenia’s new parliamentary speaker says he wants a referendum on leaving NATO. ➡️ Indonesia has agreed on oil and gas supplies from Russia ➡️ Zelensky promised to restore the operation of the "Druzhba" oil pipeline in two weeks ➡️ Rubio held talks with representatives of Israel and Lebanon at the US State Department but the Lebanese Amal Movement has rejected any form of direct negotiation with Israel ➡️ Italian PM slams Trump after attack on Pope Leo, and Trump responds ➡️ FCC Chairman Brendan Carr, when asked if he's trying to chill criticism of the administration tells companies to switch over to cable or streaming or YouTube if they don't like it ➡️ Saudi FM Prince Faisal bin Farhan tries to push back on US pressure to pick sides ➡️ Vladimir Putin will visit China soon ➡️ Trump says the war with Iran is not over 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 过去24小时的所有关键新闻 - 只因为我们喜欢你 ➡️ 俄罗斯国家技术集团（Rostec）测试了打击无人机集群使用技术。 ➡️ 斯洛文尼亚新任议长表示希望就退出北约举行公投。 ➡️ 印度尼西亚已同意从俄罗斯进口石油和天然气。 ➡️ 泽连斯基承诺在两周内恢复“友谊”输油管道的运营。 ➡️ 卢比奥在美国国务院与以色列和黎巴嫩代表举行了会谈，但黎巴嫩阿迈勒运动拒绝与以色列进行任何形式的直接谈判。 ➡️ 意大利总理在特朗普抨击教皇利奥后对其进行了批评，特朗普对此作出了回应。 ➡️ 美国联邦通信委员会（FCC）主席布伦丹·卡尔在被问及是否试图压制对政府的批评时，告诉公司如果不喜欢就转用有线电视、流媒体或YouTube。 ➡️ 沙特外交大臣费萨尔·本·法汉亲王试图抵制美国要求选边站的压力。 ➡️ 弗拉基米尔·普京即将访问中国。 ➡️ 特朗普称与伊朗的战争尚未结束。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Newly released video footage from the splashdown of NASA’s Artemis ll in the Eastern Pacific on Friday, April 10, 2026, shows the moment that U.S. Navy Divers cracked the door open and entered the Orion to greet the Astronauts, welcoming them back to Earth after their journey around the Moon. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：2026年4月10日星期五，美国国家航空航天局（NASA）的“阿耳忒弥斯2号”（Artemis II）在东太平洋溅落的最新视频片段显示，美国海军潜水员打开舱门进入“猎户座”飞船迎接宇航员，欢迎他们结束绕月之旅回到地球。推文

text: WarMonitor A former Trump WH press secretary says Americans can’t be expected to make even more economic sacrifices when they’re not convinced there ever was a real “imminent” threat or clearly told why Trump started the war on Iran to begin with. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044254223651528777/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位前特朗普白宫新闻秘书表示，当美国人并不相信存在真正的“迫在眉睫”的威胁，也不清楚特朗普为何发动对伊战争时，不能指望他们做出更多的经济牺牲。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044254223651528777/video/1 推文

text: Hide your face Hide your eyes Hide your ears Hide your fingers Everything can be easily identified. Everyone can be found https://x.com/i/status/2044244992089305321
text_zh: 遮住你的脸 遮住你的眼睛 遮住你的耳朵 遮住你的手指 一切都可以轻易被识别。每个人都可以被找到 https://x.com/i/status/2044244992089305321

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ABC: President Donald Trump said in a phone interview he is not considering extending the ceasefire, adding he believes it may not be necessary and that “an amazing two days” are ahead. Trump said the war could end either through a deal or after military objectives are achieved, while adding that he believes “the radicals are gone” and claiming the world would be “torn to pieces” without his leadership. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国广播公司（ABC）：唐纳德·特朗普总统在电话采访中表示，他不考虑延长停火协议，并补充说他认为这可能没有必要，而且“令人惊叹的两天”即将到来。特朗普表示，战争可以通过达成协议或在实现军事目标后结束，同时补充说他相信“激进分子已经消失”，并声称没有他的领导，世界将“支离破碎”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN: Sattelite images capture the burned out wreckage of two U.S. MC-130J that were attacked during rhe operation to rescue the down F-15 crew members to blow up the aircraft. The wreckage is on a remote air strip. south of the city of Isfahan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：卫星图像捕捉到了两架美国MC-130J飞机的烧毁残骸，这些飞机在营救被击落的F-15机组人员的行动中遭到袭击并被炸毁。残骸位于伊斯法罕市南部的一个偏远简易机场。 @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 An elderly Zionist spotted an activist riding by with a Palestine shirt and flag. He started talking trash. Then he fell. The trash talk stopped immediately. The pavement is antisemitic...
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 一名年长的犹太复国主义者看到一名骑车经过的活动人士穿着巴勒斯坦衬衫并挥舞旗帜。他开始进行言语攻击。然后他摔倒了。言语攻击立即停止了。人行道是反犹太主义的……

text: Open Source Intel ATF New Orleans said it responded to a fire at a Tesla sales office early this morning where a suspected Molotov cocktail was used to ignite a blaze at the front door. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044247512165265882/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国烟酒枪炮及爆炸物管理局（ATF）新奥尔良分局表示，今天清晨对特斯拉销售办事处的一起火灾做出了响应，据怀疑有人使用莫洛托夫鸡尾酒在前门纵火。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044247512165265882/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a bill Tuesday to rename State Road 80, a nearly 125-mile stretch of coast-to-coast state highway which runs from Lee County to Palm Beach County in Southern Florida, as President Donald J. Trump Highway, set to take effect July 1, 2026. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044246571353530643/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 佛罗里达州州长罗恩·德桑蒂斯周二签署了一项法案，将80号州道（一条从佛罗里达州南部李县延伸至棕榈滩县、全长近125英里的州际公路）更名为“唐纳德·J·特朗普总统公路”，该法案将于2026年7月1日生效。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044246571353530643/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper: "A blockade of Iranian ports has been fully implemented as U.S. forces maintain maritime superiority in the Middle East. An estimated 90% of Iran’s economy is fueled by international trade by sea. In less than 36 hours since the blockade was implemented, U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将：“随着美军在整个中东地区保持海上优势，对伊朗港口的封锁已全面实施。据估计，伊朗90%的经济依赖于海上国际贸易。自封锁实施不到36小时以来，美军已完全切断了伊朗的海上经济贸易。” 推文

text: Faytuks News RT @NatSec_News : The U.S. naval blockade of Iran, 12 ships strong, is backed by more than 100 aircraft including strike & ISR platforms + tankers. They’re flying from regional air bases, CSG-3, and the Tripoli ARG. CENTCOM says 10,000 Navy, Marine, & Air Force personnel are participating. https://twitter.com/NatSec_News/status/2044244424406757798/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转发 @NatSec_News：由12艘舰艇组成的美国对伊海上封锁行动，得到了包括打击和ISR平台及加油机在内的100多架飞机的支持。它们从地区空军基地、第3航母打击群（CSG-3）和的黎波里两栖戒备群（ARG）起飞。中央司令部表示，有10,000名海军、海军陆战队和空军人员参与其中。 https://twitter.com/NatSec_News/status/2044244424406757798/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In a statement from Adm. Brad Cooper, the Commander of U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), he states that the blockade of Iranian ports “has been fully implemented as U.S. forces maintain maritime superiority in the Middle East.” Cooper adds that since the blockade begin on Monday, roughly 36 hours ago, “U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）司令布拉德·库珀海军上将的一份声明中，他指出对伊朗港口的封锁“已全面实施，因为美军在整个中东地区保持着海上优势。”库珀补充说，自周一封锁开始以来的约36小时内，“美军已完全切断了伊朗的海上经济贸易。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "BREAKING! THE WAR ON IRAN IS OVER (according to Trump) "I said to him, Mr President, you keep talking about the war like, was was, was? I said, is it over? He said, it's over, over." — Maria Bartiromo after a visit to the White House 🔴 @DDGeopolitics |…" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 No, the war is not over, just close to being over 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“突发！对伊战争结束了（据特朗普所言）‘我对他说，总统先生，你一直在谈论这场战争，过去式，过去式？我说，它结束了吗？他说，结束了，结束了。’ —— 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫在访问白宫后 🔴 @DDGeopolitics |……” 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 不，战争还没有结束，只是接近结束 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 Italian Prime Minister Meloni annouced that Italy has suspended the automatic renewal of their defence agreement with Israel earlier this Tuesday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 意大利总理梅洛尼宣布，意大利已于本周二早些时候暂停了与以色列国防协议的自动续签。 @wfwitness

text: 🇯🇵 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Japanese TV on live TV: "This Kushner guy, what authority does he have? What exactly his position? Is he there simply as a representative of the Trump family? He is Jewish, right?"
text_zh: 🇯🇵 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 日本电视直播节目：“这个库什纳家伙，他有什么权力？他到底是什么职位？他仅仅是作为特朗普家族的代表在那里吗？他是犹太人，对吧？”

text: OSINTtechnical In a new statement, CENTCOM says it has completely blockaded Iran by sea, cutting off Iran from trade that fuels 90% of its economy. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044239513493397984/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在一份新的声明中，中央司令部表示已完全封锁了伊朗的海上通道，切断了伊朗90%经济来源的贸易。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044239513493397984/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US military says 'a blockade of Iranian ports has been fully implemented' and that 'US forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国军方表示“对伊朗港口的封锁已全面实施”，并且“美军已完全切断了伊朗的海上经济贸易”。 推文

text: OSINTdefender Analysts and traders on Polymarket predict that it is unlikely U.S. President Donald J. Trump will decide to end his blockade on the coastal areas of Iran anytime soon, with chances that the blockade on the Strait of Hormuz is lifted by the end of April at only 35%, down 15% since it began on Monday. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender Polymarket的分析师和交易员预测，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普不太可能很快决定结束对伊朗沿海地区的封锁，霍尔木兹海峡封锁在4月底前解除的可能性仅为35%，自周一封锁开始以来下降了15%。 推文

text: Faytuks News CENTCOM Commander Adm. Brad Cooper: "U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea" Statement from Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander: https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044237476701626522/photo/1 - U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将：“美军已完全切断了伊朗的海上经济贸易” 布拉德·库珀海军上将的声明：https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044237476701626522/photo/1 - 美国中央司令部 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Statement from Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander: https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044237476701626522/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 布拉德·库珀海军上将的声明：https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044237476701626522/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News U.S. naval forces have intercepted eight oil tankers entering or leaving Iranian ports since the start of the blockade, according to a U.S. official -WSJ The ships all complied after being told to reverse course, so no boarding was necessary https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2044234477329682811/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 据一位美国官员称，自封锁开始以来，美国海军已拦截了八艘进出伊朗港口的油轮 - 《华尔街日报》。在被告知调转航向后，这些船只均予以配合，因此无需登船。 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2044234477329682811/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Asked about FEMA’s head of response and recovery, Gregg Phillips, who claimed he “teleported” to a Waffle House, heard Satan speaking to him in Spain, and was saved by a girlfriend who was dead, Trump responded, “It just sounds a little strange.” tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 当被问及联邦紧急事务管理局（FEMA）负责响应和恢复的负责人格雷格·菲利普斯时，他声称自己“传送”到了华夫饼屋（Waffle House），在西班牙听到撒旦对他说话，并被一位已经去世的女友所救，特朗普回应说：“这听起来确实有点奇怪。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇨🇳🇷🇺 Lavrov is meeting with Xi Jinping 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 Vladimir Putin's visit to China will take place in the first half of 2026, said Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov at a meeting with Xi Jinping in Beijing. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 Lavrov is meeting with Xi Jinping 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper: A blockade of Iranian ports has been fully implemented as U.S. forces maintain maritime superiority in the Middle East. An estimated 90% of Iran's economy is fueled by international trade by sea. In less than 36 hours since the blockade was implemented, U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将：随着美军在整个中东地区保持海上优势，对伊朗港口的封锁已全面实施。据估计，伊朗90%的经济依赖于海上国际贸易。自封锁实施不到36小时以来，美军已完全切断了伊朗的海上经济贸易。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump in his interview with Maria Bartiromo, Fox News: “I think it’s close to over. Yeah. I view it as very close to over. You know what? If I pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country.”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普在接受福克斯新闻玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫采访时表示：“我认为它快要结束了。是的。我认为它非常接近结束。你知道吗？如果我现在撤出，他们需要20年才能重建那个国家。”

text: WarMonitor Asked about FEMA’s head of response and recovery, Gregg Phillips, who claimed he “teleported” to a Waffle House, heard Satan speaking to him in Spain, and was saved by a girlfriend who had died, Trump responded, “It just sounds a little strange.” tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 当被问及联邦紧急事务管理局（FEMA）负责响应和恢复的负责人格雷格·菲利普斯时，他声称自己“传送”到了华夫饼屋（Waffle House），在西班牙听到撒旦对他说话，并被一位已经去世的女友所救，特朗普回应说：“这听起来确实有点奇怪。” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: U.S. naval forces have intercepted eight oil tankers entering or leaving Iranian ports since the start of the blockade on Monday. Officials say U.S. forces contacted the crews by radio and ordered them to turn back, with all vessels complying and no boardings taking place. The first two interceptions reportedly involved ships departing Iran’s Chabahar port and were directed by a U.S. destroyer, with P-8 maritime patrol aircraft also involved. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：自周一封锁开始以来，美国海军已拦截了八艘进出伊朗港口的油轮。官员们表示，美军通过无线电联系了船员并命令他们折返，所有船只均予以配合，没有发生登船事件。据报道，前两次拦截涉及离开伊朗恰巴哈尔港的船只，并由一艘美国驱逐舰指挥，P-8海上巡逻机也参与其中。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 New Sentinel-2L satellite images show heavy damage to the United States military base at Camp Buehring, Kuwait. 🔹 Two helicopter shelters, a large maintenance structure (LAMS), and one warehouse were completely destroyed in the Iranian strikes.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 新的Sentinel-2L卫星图像显示，位于科威特的美国布埃林营地（Camp Buehring）军事基地遭受严重破坏。 🔹 伊朗的袭击摧毁了两个直升机掩体、一个大型维护结构（LAMS）和一个仓库。

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Islamic Charitable Society in Hebron, which supports more than 6,000 orphans across 2,000 families, was shut down by Israeli forces, which arrested its president, Sheikh Hatem Al-Bakri, along with staff
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 希伯伦的伊斯兰慈善协会支持着2,000个家庭中的6,000多名孤儿，该协会被以色列军队关闭，其主席谢赫·哈特姆·巴克里（Sheikh Hatem Al-Bakri）及工作人员被捕。

text: WarMonitor Gene Seroka, Executive Director at the Port of Los Angeles, says even if the war ended tomorrow, it would take more than four and a half months to see “some resemblance of normalcy.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044225360904991236/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 洛杉矶港执行董事吉恩·塞罗卡表示，即使战争明天结束，也需要四个半月以上的时间才能看到“某种恢复正常的迹象”。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044225360904991236/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump spoke about ending the Iran War in a currently unreleased interview filmed Tuesday with Fox News. Trump: “I had to divert because if I didn't do that, right now, you would have Iran with a nuclear weapon. And if they had a nuclear weapon, you would be calling everybody over there, sir. And you don't want to do that.” Interviewer: “Well, you keep saying was, is this war over?” Trump: “I think it's close to over. Yeah. I mean, I view it as very close to over. You know what? If I pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country. And we're not finished. We'll see what happens. I think they want to make a deal very badly.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在周二拍摄的一段尚未发布的福克斯新闻采访中谈到了结束伊朗战争。特朗普：“我不得不转移，因为如果我不这样做，现在伊朗就会拥有核武器。如果他们拥有核武器，你就会呼叫那里的所有人，长官。你不会想那样做的。” 采访者：“好吧，你一直在说过去式，这场战争结束了吗？” 特朗普：“我认为它快要结束了。是的。我的意思是，我认为它非常接近结束。你知道吗？如果我现在撤出，他们需要20年才能重建那个国家。我们还没有完成。我们会看看发生什么。我认为他们非常渴望达成协议。” 推文

text: Faytuks News Trump: "And we're not finished. We'll see what happens" Maria: Is this war over? Trump: I mean, I view it as very close to over. You know what? If I pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country. And we're not finished. We'll see what happens. I think they want to make a deal very badly. https://twitter.com/AZ_Intel_/status/2044216718688477632/video/1 - AZ Intel tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 特朗普：“我们还没有完成。我们会看看发生什么” 玛丽亚：这场战争结束了吗？ 特朗普：我的意思是，我认为它非常接近结束。你知道吗？如果我现在撤出，他们需要20年才能重建那个国家。我们还没有完成。我们会看看发生什么。我认为他们非常渴望达成协议。 https://twitter.com/AZ_Intel_/status/2044216718688477632/video/1 - AZ Intel 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump tells Fox News that Iran war is 'very close to over' and that it would Iran '20 years to rebuild their country'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普告诉福克斯新闻，伊朗战争“非常接近结束”，并且伊朗需要“20年才能重建他们的国家”。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 TankerTrackers: A non-Iranian VLCC supertanker, capable of carrying around “2 million barrels” of crude and sanctioned by the US OFAC, has entered Iranian waters via the Strait of Hormuz with AIS active. The movement was identified and verified through maritime tracking data, indicating continued activity by sanctioned vessels despite CENTCOM measures. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 TankerTrackers：一艘非伊朗籍的VLCC超级油轮，能够运载约“200万桶”原油，并受到美国海外资产控制办公室（OFAC）的制裁，在AIS（自动识别系统）开启的情况下通过霍尔木兹海峡进入伊朗水域。该动向已通过海上跟踪数据识别并核实，表明尽管有中央司令部的措施，受制裁的船只仍在继续活动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy confirmed that U.S. Special Envoy Witkoff and Jared Kushner will visit Ukraine, however a date hasn’t been agreed upon yet. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 乌克兰总统泽连斯基证实，美国特使威特科夫（Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳将访问乌克兰，但尚未商定具体日期。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Empires fall, but true civilization endures.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 帝国终会陨落，但真正的文明永存。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Fox News: US President Donald Trump says the war is “very close to over” when asked by Fox News anchor Maria Bartiromo whether the conflict has ended. He adds that if the US “pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country.” Trump says “we’re not finished” and suggests Iran “want to make a deal very badly.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 福克斯新闻：当被福克斯新闻主播玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫问及冲突是否结束时，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示战争“非常接近结束”。他补充说，如果美国“现在撤出，他们需要20年才能重建那个国家”。特朗普表示“我们还没有完成”，并暗示伊朗“非常渴望达成协议”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: More than 12 U.S. military vessels are enforcing the U.S. maritime blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. A U.S. official added that over 20 commercial vessels that weren’t linked to Iran transited the Strait in the first 24 hours of the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：超过12艘美国军舰正在执行美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁。一位美国官员补充说，在封锁的前24小时内，有超过20艘与伊朗无关的商船通过了海峡。 @wfwitness

text: 🚢 According to Tanker Trackers, a non-Iranian VLCC supertanker successfully transited the straight with her AIS on. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🚢 据Tanker Trackers称，一艘非伊朗籍的VLCC超级油轮在开启AIS的情况下成功通过了海峡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "🇮🇱l🇱🇧 According to the interrogation transcripts, during a conversation between agent Elie D. and his Mossad handler Mark," The government would have attested 10x more Israeli spies if it dedicated any teams or units for funds for it. They simply do not care. Full video here: https://youtu.be/lML4JZVHyG8
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“🇮🇱l🇱🇧 根据审讯记录，在特工Elie D.与他的摩萨德联络人Mark的谈话中，” 如果政府投入任何团队或资金，本可以查出多出10倍的以色列间谍。他们根本不在乎。完整视频在这里：https://youtu.be/lML4JZVHyG8

text: 🇮🇱 l 🇱🇧 According to the interrogation transcripts, during a conversation between agent Elie D. and his Mossad handler Mark, Elie says: "We wish Israel could eliminate Hezbullah." To which Mossad agent Mark replies: "Not just Hezbullah, we have to eliminate all Muslims in the world, and Shiites in particular."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 l 🇱🇧 根据审讯记录，在特工Elie D.与他的摩萨德联络人Mark的谈话中，Elie说：“我们希望以色列能消灭真主党。” 摩萨德特工Mark回答说：“不仅仅是真主党，我们必须消灭世界上所有的穆斯林，尤其是什叶派。”

text: 🇺🇸 Legendary whistleblower Chelsea Manning perp walked by a cop named “Anger” after arrest at a protest against the Iran War in NYC today
text_zh: 🇺🇸 传奇举报人切尔西·曼宁今天在纽约市抗议对伊战争时被捕，并被一名叫“愤怒”（Anger）的警察押送

text: The Christian of south Lebanon will eventually regret this /172126?single
text_zh: 黎巴嫩南部的基督徒最终会后悔的 /172126?single

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 According to Hind Rajab Foundation co-founder Dyab Abou Jahjah, Daniel Ella—commander of the 52nd Battalion, Israel’s 401st Brigade—was severely injured in clashes with Hezbollah today. He led the unit responsible for the killing of 5-year-old Hind Rajab in Gaza, in January 2024.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 据Hind Rajab基金会联合创始人Dyab Abou Jahjah称，以色列第401旅第52营营长丹尼尔·埃拉（Daniel Ella）在今天与真主党的冲突中受重伤。他曾领导该部队，该部队应对2024年1月在加沙杀害5岁女孩Hind Rajab负责。
